mapper.select: SELECT a.account_id, a.emp_no, a.branch_code, a.role_id, a.login_id, b.name AS branchName, k.kiosk_id, e.name AS name FROM account a JOIN kiosk k ON a.branch_code = k.branch_code JOIN branch b ON a.branch_code = b.branch_code JOIN employee e ON a.emp_no = e.emp_no WHERE a.login_id = #{login_id} AND a.password = #{password} AND k.kiosk_id = #{kiosk_id} AND a.role_id = 2 AND a.status = 'ACTIVE' AND b.status = 'ACTIVE' AND k.status = 'NORMAL'
SELECT branch_code, name FROM branch WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' AND branch_code != 1 ORDER BY name ASC
SELECT kiosk_id, branch_code, status FROM kiosk WHERE branch_code = #{branchCode} AND status = 'NORMAL' ORDER BY kiosk_id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (order_id,branch_code, kiosk_id, order_type, total_amount) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{branchCode}, #{kioskId}, #{orderType}, #{totalAmount})
INSERT INTO order_menu (order_id, recipe_code, qty, unit_price, line_total_amount) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{recipeCode}, #{qty}, #{unit_price}, #{lineTotalAmount})
INSERT INTO order_option (order_menu_id, material_code, extra_price) SELECT #{orderMenuId}, #{materialCode}, COALESCE(m.price, 0) FROM material m WHERE m.material_code = #{materialCode}
mapper.select: SELECT order_id AS orderId, branch_code AS branchCode, kiosk_id AS kioskId, order_type AS orderType, total_amount AS totalAmount FROM orders WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.update: update orders set status = #{status} where order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.select: SELECT price FROM recipe WHERE recipe_code = #{recipeCode}
